calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Jeffrey Dennis-Strathmeyer appearing for executor. Andrew Dimitriou appearing for objector. Court's tentative ruling is the accounting and distribution are approved. Statutory fees is reduced by $300.00 for not getting interest with the checking account. Mr. Dimitriou argues that they have not follow the rules by giving proper notice. He wants the executor to file a report. Court is satisfied with what is on file. $20,000.00 reserve is appropriate. Court will require a supplemental accounting before final discharge. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Jul-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jeff Dennis-Strathmeyer appearing for petitioner. Andrew Dimitriou appearing for objector Terese Kelly. Mr. Dimitriou apologizes for not filing the amended objection yet. Mr. Dennis-strathmeyer wants to review what he has this morning. Both counsel meet outside of court. At 10:20am, both counsel return to court with an agreement to file the amended objection by 6/12, response by 6/19 and case is continued to 7/3. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
